baseline: Permutation [market, news, fundamentals] is the default production order; serves as within-experiment baseline. Cross-experiment baseline: WC-10 v1 pilot (NVDA Jan-Apr 2026) used the default order; per-date NVDA outcomes in v1 + (when v2 lands) v2 are the reference distribution.
notes: WC-11 v1 scaffold: 5 dates × 1 ticker (NVDA) × 4 analyst-order permutations = 20 propagates × $0.40 = $8 (T1, ≤$10). Predicts NULL or detects ALT-A/ALT-B first/last-speaker bias. Implementation Option B recommended (new pilot harness, no structural change to trading_graph.py) per Constitution VI. NOT yet launched; HYPOTHESIS + PARAMS scaffold only — operator authorization required to invoke.
